title: Do not stale-timeout active optimizer runs during long evaluation phases

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Branch-cleanup note: the stale-timeout runtime-identity fix in stale_timeout.py is included in the current dirty worktree on chore/med-review-guideline-scope-audit. Preserving it in this cleanup commit is required before starting the next feature branch so new optimizer runs inherit the active-PID/host skip logic instead of the older false-positive stall behavior.
